content: I fall in love with you a little more every time you laugh.
You are my today and all of my tomorrows.
Whatever our souls are made of, yours and mine are the same.
If I know what love is, it is because of you.
I have waited for this opportunity for more than half a century, to repeat to you once again my vow of fidelity and everlasting love.
You have bewitched me, body and soul.
I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours. In all the world, there is no love for you like mine.
I would rather spend one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
You are my sun, my moon, and all my stars.
I saw that you were perfect, and so I loved you. Then I saw that you were not perfect and I loved you even more.
The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
I need you like a heart needs a beat.
If equal affection cannot be, let the more loving one be me.
Grow old with me! The best is yet to be.
You are my blue crayon—the one I never have enough of, the one I use to color my sky.
I love you begins by I, but it ends up by you.
To love is nothing. To be loved is something. But to love and be loved, that’s everything.
I still haven’t figured out how to sit across from you and not be madly in love with everything you do.
Your hand touching mine—this is how galaxies collide.
When I follow my heart, it leads me to you.
I love you more than there are stars in the sky and fish in the sea.
Every atom of your flesh is as dear to me as my own.
I am catastrophically in love with you.
You are the finest, loveliest, tenderest, and most beautiful person I have ever known—and even that is an understatement.
I wish I had done everything on earth with you.
I want all of you, forever, you and me, every day.
You should be kissed and often, and by someone who knows how.
I’ve been in love with you since the very beginning. You asked why there isn’t anyone else in my life, and the reason is you.
I look at you and see the rest of my life in front of my eyes.
Thinking of you keeps me awake. Dreaming of you keeps me asleep. Being with you keeps me alive.
I choose you. And I’ll choose you over and over, without pause, without doubt, in a heartbeat.
You are my heart, my life, my one and only thought.
I love you because the entire universe conspired to help me find you.
The water shines only by the sun. And it is you who are my sun.
My soul will find yours.
You are every reason, every hope, and every dream I’ve ever had.
I love you without knowing how, or when, or from where.
Take love, multiply it by infinity and take it to the depths of forever, and you still have only a glimpse of how I feel for you.
I swear I couldn’t love you more than I do right now, and yet I know I will tomorrow.
If you live to be a hundred, I want to live to be a hundred minus one day so I never have to live without you.
You are my today, my tomorrow, and my forever.
Meeting you was fate, becoming your friend was a choice, but falling in love with you was beyond my control.
I love you more than coffee, and that’s saying a lot.
You are my favorite notification.
Home is not a place—it’s wherever I’m with you.
I still get butterflies even though I’ve seen you a hundred times.
When you realize you want to spend the rest of your life with somebody, you want the rest of your life to start as soon as possible.
Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies.
You are my greatest adventure.
I love you past the moon and miss you beyond the stars.
To the world you may be one person, but to one person you are the world.
I have found the one whom my soul loves.
You make me want to be a better person.
I never want to stop making memories with you.
You are my happy place.
Loved you yesterday, love you still, always have, always will.
I would not wish any companion in the world but you.
My heart is, and always will be, yours.
You are the source of my joy, the center of my world, and the whole of my heart.
When I saw you I fell in love, and you smiled because you knew.
I love you not for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
You are the last thought in my mind before I drift off to sleep and the first when I wake.
Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favorite.
I love you more than I have ever found a way to say to you.
You are my soulmate, my best friend, my home.
If I had a flower for every time I thought of you, I could walk in my garden forever.
You are the risk worth taking.
I love you to the moon and back.
With you, forever won’t be too long.
You are my person.
I love you simply, without problems or pride.
You are my favorite hello and my hardest goodbye.
In case you ever foolishly forget: I am never not thinking of you.
You are the love I never knew I needed.
I choose you. Again and again, at the start and finish.
You are my always.
